name: Eggplant and Rice Scallop
recipeInstructions:
1. In a casserole or deep baking dish, place a layer of fried eggplant slices.
2. Spread the cooked rice evenly over the top.
3. Add the meat on top of the rice.
4. Place another layer of fried eggplant slices on top.
5. Beat the egg and add a little water to create an egg wash. Pour this mixture over the top of the dish.
6. Pour any remaining water around the sides of the baking dish.
7. Season with salt to taste.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F.
9. Serve hot.
